division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: Agricultural water-well boring rigs are exempt from the fees provided in Section 9400.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 6. Registration and Weight Fees [9101 - 9808]
#### Article 3. Weight Fees [9400 - 9410]
##### § 9405

Agricultural water-well boring rigs are exempt from the fees provided in Section 9400.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Agricultural water-well boring rigs are exempt from the fees provided in Section 9400.
